result.summary: The interface is functional with minor visual inconsistencies in button shapes and clipped card elements.

issues.description: The search icon button style is inconsistent with the pill-shaped category buttons next to it.
issues.suggestion: Format the search button to match the pill shape of the other navigation buttons for visual unity.

issues.description: Game cards on the right edge are partially clipped, which is standard for carousels but can appear visually untidy.
issues.suggestion: Adjust the spacing or add a subtle fade effect on the right edge to make the scroll indicators clearer.
